assessment_items.question_content:
**Masaccio's *Holy Trinity* is credited with being the first true example of one-point linear perspective.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/056cf927a67b9f9ae3109fa14644653f.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**This is correct. Masaccio's Holy Trinity is credited with being the first true example of one-point linear perspective.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/masaccio--holy-trinity--c--1427)**

assessment_items.question_content: **One-point linear perspective had been developed by [[☃ dropdown 1]] one year earlier.**
hints:
**One-point linear perspective had been developed by Brunelleschi one year earlier.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/masaccio--holy-trinity--c--1427)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is NOT true of Masaccio's *Holy Trinity*?**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/056cf927a67b9f9ae3109fa14644653f.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**The barrel vault with coffers recalls the architecture of Ancient Rome (not Egypt).**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/masaccio--holy-trinity--c--1427)**

choices.content: Many families commissioned a chapel in fifteenth-century Florence, but this is more modest, as it is only the illusion of a chapel.
The center of the painting shows the Trinity, or three-part nature of God, in the Catholic tradition: God the Father, the Holy Spirit, and Christ.
The figure of Christ shows a realistic and sympathetic body, which is typical of the way that Renaissance artists married faith and science.
The barrel vault with coffers recalls the architecture of Ancient Egypt.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Everything in this space is meant to appear disjointed and unnatural.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/056cf927a67b9f9ae3109fa14644653f.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**This is incorrect. Everything in this space is meant to appear lifelike and rational.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/masaccio--holy-trinity--c--1427)**
